key_decisions.original_text: ETH/70 optional for Ball DevNet 3; not required without gas limit EIP
EPBS DevNet 1 launches tomorrow with Alpha 4 consensus spec
Glamsterdam DevNet 0 will not include new EIPs beyond Ball+EPBS merge
key_decisions.context: no new EIPs beyond Ball+EPBS merge

key_decisions.original_text: External builder API must be tested in isolation before Ball+EPBS merge
Next week's ACD Testing call (April 6) cancelled for Easter Monday
